failure_modes.cause: BPR set below required pressure, leading to potential overpressure
failure_modes.mitigation: Increase BPR setting to at least 16.8 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.mode: Flow restriction due to solvent viscosity
failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG solvent at operating temperature
failure_modes.mitigation: Ensure pump is rated for high-viscosity fluids and monitor flow rate

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=3.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Test BPR at 16.8 bar with solvent to ensure stability under operating conditions
Measure flow rate and pressure drop with TBAB/EG solvent at 120°C to confirm pump capability
